entries.description: Afghanistan withdrawal execution: Chaotic Kabul evacuation, 13 U.S. service members killed in Abbey Gate bombing, abandonment of allies, equipment, and Afghan interpreters
entries.causation_evidence: House Foreign Affairs Committee Afghanistan withdrawal report (2022) and SIGAR audits

entries.description: Border policy and record migrant encounters: Over 10 million encounters at southern border since 2021, including record fentanyl deaths and humanitarian crisis
entries.causation_evidence: CBP official statistics through FY2025 and House Homeland Security Committee reports

entries.description: Inflation surge following American Rescue Plan and spending bills: Peaked at 9.1% in 2022, highest in 40 years, eroding purchasing power for millions
entries.causation_evidence: Bureau of Labor Statistics CPI data and Federal Reserve analyses

entries.description: Hunter Biden influence peddling: Documented use of family name for foreign business dealings while father was Vice President and President
entries.causation_evidence: House Oversight Committee impeachment inquiry reports and IRS whistleblower testimony

entries.description: Special Counsel Hur report: Classified documents found in Biden's garage and home; described Biden as 'elderly man with poor memory' who could not be charged due to jury sympathy
entries.causation_evidence: Special Counsel Robert Hur final report (February 2024)

entries.description: Student loan forgiveness executive action: Attempted cancellation of $400+ billion in debt later struck down by Supreme Court as overreach
entries.causation_evidence: Supreme Court ruling in Biden v. Nebraska (2023)

entries.description: Vaccine mandate for federal employees, military, and contractors: Led to thousands of separations and widespread legal challenges
entries.causation_evidence: Executive orders and subsequent court rulings

entries.description: Debate performance and public concerns over cognitive fitness: Widely criticized performance raised questions about fitness for office
entries.causation_evidence: CNN Presidential Debate transcript and subsequent Special Counsel Hur testimony

entries.description: Energy policy reversal: Cancellation of Keystone XL pipeline and pause on new drilling leases contributing to energy price spikes
entries.causation_evidence: Executive orders and EIA energy price data

entries.description: Handling of Israel-Hamas war: Delayed and inconsistent messaging, plus criticism over slow humanitarian aid approvals
entries.causation_evidence: State Department reports and congressional oversight hearings

entries.description: Build Back Better / Inflation Reduction Act spending: Massive deficit increases with limited long-term growth impact
Pressure campaign to remain in 2024 race despite clear signs of diminished capacity, delaying party transition
entries.causation_evidence: Contemporary reporting and post-debate internal Democratic communications

entries.description: Continued record fentanyl deaths: Over 100,000 annual overdose deaths tied to open border policies and cartel facilitation
entries.causation_evidence: CDC overdose statistics and DEA reports through 2025

entries.description: American Rescue Plan and infrastructure investments: Record job creation and infrastructure bill passage in first year
entries.causation_evidence: BLS employment data and bipartisan Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act

entries.description: CHIPS and Science Act: Secured bipartisan passage of major semiconductor manufacturing revival legislation
entries.causation_evidence: Official White House and congressional records
